summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 68 - All 9 Extracted Route Modules Testing Complete. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly. Fixed critical import error in config/database.py that was preventing backend startup.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: config/database.py was missing required exports (db, get_tenant_db, set_tenant_context, _tenant_db_ctx) - now restored to match server.py definitions
FIXED: config/__init__.py was importing non-existent exports - now correctly exports all required symbols

All 9 extracted route modules tested and working: products_routes.py, customers_routes.py, sales_routes.py, purchases_routes.py, stats_routes.py, employees_routes.py, cashbox_routes.py, debts_routes.py, expenses_routes.py
NEW employees routes tested: GET /api/employees, GET /api/employees/salary-report, GET /api/employees/alerts/active, POST /api/employees
NEW cashbox routes tested: GET /api/cash-boxes, GET /api/transactions
NEW debts routes tested: GET /api/debts, POST /api/debts
NEW expenses routes tested: GET /api/expenses, GET /api/expenses/stats, GET /api/expenses/reminders, POST /api/expenses

Previously extracted routes verified: Products (paginated, barcode, low-stock), Customers (generate-code), Sales (generate-code), Purchases (generate-code), Stats (dashboard, profit, chart, prediction)
seed_data_creation: Created test employee, expense, and debt during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 route modules successfully extracted from 12K-line server.py. Routes use factory pattern: create_xxx_routes(db, get_current_user, get_tenant_admin, require_tenant). config/database.py now properly exports db, get_tenant_db, set_tenant_context, _tenant_db_ctx to match server.py. Employee creation needs: {name, phone, salary, commission_rate}. Expense needs: {title, category, amount}. Debt needs: {type, party_type, party_id, amount}.

fix_applied.issue: Backend failing to start due to ImportError in config/database.py
fix_applied.root_cause: config/database.py was simplified and missing required exports (db, get_tenant_db, set_tenant_context, _tenant_db_ctx) that utils/auth.py was importing
fix_applied.fix: Restored full database configuration with _TenantDBProxy class, ContextVar for tenant isolation, and all required exports
